name: イーシャの魔法書解読室
slug: イーシャの魔法書解読室
short_description: [roguelike]Together with the wizard Isha, embark on a roguelike adventure to decipher the magic book and resolve the anomalies occurring in this land!
detailed_description:
[Turn-Based Roguelike Game]

Together with the wizard Isha, embark on an adventure to decipher the magic book and resolve the anomalies occurring in this land!

[Conquer Dungeons with Various Builds]

In addition to the roguelike element of obtaining items each time you defeat enemies, you can also customize the items you take with you when challenging dungeons to suit your preferences!

As you progress in deciphering the magic book, you'll be able to freely create spells by combining the decoded words.

Think up the ultimate build and conquer the dungeons!

[Unique and Diverse Characters]

The playable characters include the protagonist, Isha; Isha's sister, Lipka; and their childhood friend, the elf Zeeka.

Each character has different items and stats that they bring into dungeons. If you're stuck on a challenge, trying a different character might just do the trick!
